name: 40 HEX IP Panel

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: E48AE239-20C3-45E2-9031-8A8AE6D03B21

comment: The ADJ 40 HEX Panel IP is a versatile, IP65-rated fixture designed for both indoor and outdoor applications as a wash light, blinder, or color strobe. It is equipped with 40x 20W HEX LEDs (6-in-1: RGBAL+UV) and features 10 independently controllable sections with Pixel Zone Control. Its durable all-metal, black housing is IP65-rated, offering protection against dust, sand, moisture, and liquids. A magnetic, removable filter frame allows for the addition of a diffusion filter to adjust the beam angle.

It is equipped with 40x 20W HEX LEDs (6-in-1: RGBAL+UV) and features 10 independently controllable sections with Pixel Zone Control. Its durable all-metal, black housing is IP65-rated, offering protection against dust, sand, moisture, and liquids.
